body:
Content
- Update compat for insolation, cloudmicrophys, thermo, and surfacefluxes
- Update `create_parameter_set` for the CLIMAparameters changes
- Remove all `alias` fields from the toml files, rename `entr_tau` and `detr_tau` in toml files
- Change `updraft_number` to be configured in `default_edmf_config.yml` instead of retrieved from CLIMAParameters
- Add checks for unused parameters (in case of typos or other errors) and logs all used parameters
- Does not update RRTMGP or fully update Thermodynamics. RRTMGP update will be split off into another PR.
- Update lookahead GHA to dev before instantiating
title: Update breaking parameter changes

body: This PR truncates the stack traces in the tests
title: Truncate stack traces in tests

body: This PR applies some fixes in #2511.
title: Fix graceful exit feature

body:
According to our flame graphs, the use of `CompoundPeriod`'s is the leading allocator (due to https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/issues/52873), so this PR adds an option for disabling progress logging, and we disable it for our performance runs.

We'd like to further reduce GC needs, which could be impacting https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl/issues/2222.
title: Add option for disabling progress logging

body: This PR lowers the JET failure limit to 94.
title: Lower JET failure limit

body: This PR adds a flame graph for a GPU job.
title: Add a flame graph for one of our gpu jobs

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 

Apparently the `--cpus-per-task` arguments in `sbatch` are _not_ passed to `srun`. This seems to avoid catastrophic fall offs in scaling when the machine is busy.

run before change: https://buildkite.com/clima/climaatmos-target-gpu-simulations/builds/186
- moist HS 4xA100: sypd: 1.4577044490289248

run after change: https://buildkite.com/clima/climaatmos-target-gpu-simulations/builds/187
- moist HS 4xA100: sypd: 4.996379365801879
